prompt: Turn my current working tree into a PR for the bugfix spec at specs/fix-rate-limit.md. I am already on a feature branch.

assertions.text: Exactly one new commit is created for the task
Existing feature branch fix/456-rate-limit is preserved
Commit message includes issue linkage to #456
Commit message contains a Co-authored-by trailer matching the format Co-authored-by: NAME <EMAIL>
Origin push succeeds for the working branch
A PR URL is produced or gh pr create was attempted
